title: Weielt Heavy Duty Combination Padlocks Outdoor, 52mm Stainless Steel 4 Digit Locker Code Padlock Weatherproof with Hardened Steel 8mm Diameter Shackle for Gates, Shed, Fence, Warehouse (Black-Long)
features: 【Keyless Security】This Heavy Duty Combination Padlocks provides convenient keyless unlock. With 10,000 potential combinations, you can say goodbye to the hassle of keys and enjoy keyless security.

【Material】Featuring an 8mm hardened steel shackle and a 52mm wide zinc alloy body, this coded padlock is made of solid metal and designed to withstand any attempt at forced entry. With its 270g weight, it offers both durability and convenience for all your locking needs.

【Durable And Weatherproof】This combination lock has a rust-resistant coating and can be used in harsh environments. It has undergone over 180 hours of salt spray testing and still operates smoothly, demonstrating its resistance to harsh conditions.
【Easy Unlock】Our padlock looks high-end and stylish, convenient and ceremonial. After setting the 4 digit correctly, press the middle button and the hook will pop up.

【Widely Used】Protect your valuable assets with our heavy-duty combination padlock, designed for indoor and outdoor use. Ideal for securing gates, garages, fences, schools, gyms, staff offices and more, this padlock offers superior protection and anti-theft security.
description: Product Description Product Parameters Material: Zinc Alloy & Hardened Solid Stainless Steel Color: Black / Silver Thickness of the hardened steel shackle: 8mm Number Of Password Combinations: 10000 Weight: 288g Characteristic: Rust and waterproof, can be used outdoors Widely Used: Perfect for both indoor and outdoor. Features: Easy to unlock Unique 4-digit combination lock Anti-rust and weather-resistant Thickened shackle provide more security Made of heavy duty 304 stainless steel Tips The initial password is: "0-0-0-0-0". Please change the password as soon as possible. The combination lock is made of strong material and is difficult to open by external forces. Please remember the password set, once you have forgotten it, it cannot be changed. Please note! When setting a password, please ensure that the numbers are aligned perfectly with the slots, otherwise the setting may be ineffective. The password lock cannot be opened or have its password set with an incorrect password.
